text:
(a) Sections 112.152 (Liability Generally for Injury to or Death of Employee) , 112.153 (Contributory Negligence) , 112.154 (Assumed Risk) (d), 112.155 (Certain Provisions Void) , and 112.156 (Liability Offset) do not:

(1) limit the duty or liability of a railroad operator or impair the rights of an employee under the Revised Statutes of 1925; or

(2) affect a right of action under another law of this state.

(b) Except as provided by Section 112.151 (Applicability of Subchapter) , a section listed in Subsection (a) controls over any other provision of the Revised Statutes of 1925 with which it conflicts.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 112. Powers & Duties of Railroads
##### § 112.157 — Construction of Certain Sections

(a) Sections 112.152 (Liability Generally for Injury to or Death of Employee) , 112.153 (Contributory Negligence) , 112.154 (Assumed Risk) (d), 112.155 (Certain Provisions Void) , and 112.156 (Liability Offset) do not:

    (1) limit the duty or liability of a railroad operator or impair the rights of an employee under the Revised Statutes of 1925; or

    (2) affect a right of action under another law of this state.

(b) Except as provided by Section 112.151 (Applicability of Subchapter) , a section listed in Subsection (a) controls over any other provision of the Revised Statutes of 1925 with which it conflicts.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.03, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: Sections 112.152 (Liability Generally for Injury to or Death of Employee) , 112.153 (Contributory Negligence) , 112.154 (Assumed Risk) (d), 112.155 (Certain Provisions Void) , and 112.156 (Liability Offset) do not:
limit the duty or liability of a railroad operator or impair the rights of an employee under the Revised Statutes of 1925; or
affect a right of action under another law of this state.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Except as provided by Section 112.151 (Applicability of Subchapter) , a section listed in Subsection (a) controls over any other provision of the Revised Statutes of 1925 with which it conflicts.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.03, eff. April 1, 2011.
